---
title: "Introduction"
---

This is a dashboard for the [BDBV Modeling Hub](https://github.com/InsightNet-US/BDBV-Modeling-Hub) built to collect outbreak size estimates of the Bundibugyo (Ebola) virus outbreak in 2026.

::: {style='display:flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center'}

[View The Latest Forecasts](custom-plot.html){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

:::
